_comment: Register the RSS Tool Server with Hermes' MCP client (stdio) so Hermes can call our tools. Full set: compose_caption, save_draft, get_post, update_post_status, save_idea, generate_image, assemble_carousel (AI), render_card, render_carousel, render_jargon_card, render_hybrid_card, render_hybrid_carousel (deterministic + hybrid), publish_linkedin_single, publish_linkedin_document, publish_instagram (approval-gated). The repo runs TypeScript directly via tsx (no build step), so the tsx entry below is also correct for prod. The deterministic render tools need Chromium: `pnpm --filter @rss/render exec playwright install --with-deps chromium`. Replace cwd + env placeholders for your deployment. A portable, env-file variant for Claude Code lives at the repo-root .mcp.json.
